$meta.desc_note: VERBATIM game data (0.9.4.x). Block-Power-derived numbers shown as text (depend on equipped shield).

skills.desc: 'Raise Shield' 3 turns: +10% Block Chance (scales with shield's Block Chance), +15% Max Block Power, +20% Crit Avoidance, -200% Dodge. Light shield: +20% BP refill, +10% Counter, no Dodge penalty. Heavy: +33% Energy Restoration.
skills.dyn:
Activates "Raise Shield" for 3 turns:
+10% Block Chance (+ (AGL + VIT) × shield's Block Chance ÷ 100)
+{-5+STR+VIT}% Max Block Power
+{AGL+PRC}% Crit Avoidance
-200% Dodge Chance

If equipped with a light shield, replenishes {2*VIT}% Max Block Power, grants the effect +{5+0.5*AGL}% Counter Chance, and doesn't penalize Dodge Chance.

If equipped with a heavy shield, grants the effect +33% Energy Restoration.

skills.desc: Full blocks: +5% Max Energy, tree cooldowns -2. Partial blocks: -5% Damage Taken 6 turns (x2).
skills.dyn:
Full blocks replenish {-5+WIL}% Max Energy and reduce the ability tree's cooldowns by 2 turns.

Partial blocks grant -5% Damage Taken for 6 turns.

The effect stacks up to 2 times.

skills.desc: 6 Crushing to 3 adjacent tiles, 85% Accuracy, 80% Stagger. Hits: target -20% Control Res, -25% Move Res 6 turns; +5% BP Recovery 3 turns and tree cooldowns -2 per enemy in area. Light shield: -25% CD. Heavy: hits +10% Damage Taken 6 turns.
skills.dyn:
Deals Crushing Damage to three adjacent tiles ((6 + 25% of Max Block Power) × shield condition) with {65+2*PRC}% Accuracy, Crit Chance equal to 10% of Block Chance, and {60+2*STR}% Stagger Chance.

Hitting a target applies it with -20% Control Resistance and -25% Move Resistance for 6 turns.

Grants +{0.5*VIT}% Block Power Recovery for 3 turns and reduces the ability tree's cooldowns by 2 turns for each enemy within the skill's area of effect.

If equipped with a light shield, grants the skill -25% Cooldown Duration.

If equipped with a heavy shield, hitting a target applies it with +10% Damage Taken for 6 turns (the effect stacks up to 2 times).

skills.desc:
Using the ability tree's skills grants +5% Weapon Damage and +4% Counter Chance for 5 turns.

The effect stacks up to 3 times.

Damaging counters replenish 5% Max Block Power.

Grants +3% Block Power Recovery for 6 turns for each adjacent enemy.

Each received hit grants +3% Energy Restoration for 6 turns.

Both effects stack up to 5 times.

If equipped with a light shield, both effects trigger twice per turn.
8 Crushing, 100% Accuracy, 40% Daze, 80% Knockback. Replenishes 15% Max Block Power. Light shield: -25% CD. Heavy: BP refill = 30% of damage.
skills.dyn:
Deals Crushing Damage ((8 + 30% of Max Block Power) × shield condition) with {80+2*PRC}% Accuracy, Crit Chance equal to 20% of Block Chance, {2*AGL+2*PRC}% Daze Chance, and {60+2*STR}% Knockback Chance.

Replenishes {-5+2*VIT}% Max Block Power.

If equipped with a light shield, grants the skill -25% Cooldown Duration.

If equipped with a heavy shield, replenishes Block Power for 30% of the damage dealt.

skills.desc:
Activates "Hold the Line!" for 10 turns:
-5% Damage Taken
+5% Block Power Recovery
+7% Counter Chance
+10% Move Resistance
+10% Control Resistance

Using the ability tree's skills grants 2 stacks of the effect (up to IV) but reduces its duration by 1 turn.

Each received hit prolongs the effect's duration by 1 turn (up to 10) but reduces its number of stacks (no more than once per turn).

If equipped with a light shield, grants the skill -25% Cooldown Duration.

If equipped with a heavy shield, grants an extra stack of the effect upon activation.

Grants "Shield Bash" and "Breakthrough" +50% Damage and increases their Crit Chance by half.

Using these skills applies the target with -10% Accuracy, -10% Counter Chance, and -15% Weapon Damage for 5 turns.

The effect stacks up to 2 times.
